name: transworld-engagement
releaseNote: Research Phase 2c hotfix: the Resend webhook now suppresses a subscriber on a real hard bounce. Resend labels a permanent bounce type='Permanent' (with a soft bounce type='Transient'), not 'hard' — so the previous check logged the bounce on send_log but never flipped report_subscriptions to 'bounced'. The bounce match is now case-insensitive on 'permanent' (accepting 'hard' too); transient/soft bounces are still left alone for Resend to retry. Webhook-only change; no schema, dependency, or environment change.
